finding_results.notes: Kept one decisive non-exit choice when Nina offers the door, then redirected the following beat into command, shame, and Beni's reduction into usefulness instead of restating that he could still leave.
Trimmed the mid-scene Hungary pressure to sensory intrusion only and left the final paragraph as the first full naming of the repeated married-woman pattern.

summary: Tightened the garage scene so Beni's non-exit happens once and the aftermath deepens classed submission, while deferring the chapter's full recognition of the old married-woman wound to the closing paragraph.
